summary: Frontend UI testing for game board and question page improvements. Tested full flow: homepage → team setup → category select → game board → question page. All major UI elements verified visually and via data-testid selectors.

issues: Team name font size is clamp(0.65rem, 1.2vw, 0.85rem) which is small (max ~16px). Score is clamp(1.1rem, 2.2vw, 1.6rem) which is better but top bar overall feels compact at 1920x1080.

critical_code_review_comments: QuestionPage top bar - team name labels are capped at 0.85rem max (clamp 0.65rem-0.85rem) which is quite small. If the requirement was to make them 'bigger than before', verify these values reflect an actual increase.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI improvements verified working: 1) GameBoard team blocks show glow effect on active turn (team1-score has red glow when turn=1, team2-score has blue glow when turn=2), 2) Turn indicator data-testid='turn-indicator' visible with team name 'دور الأسود', 3) Dark mode toggle visible, 4) Assign buttons (assign-team1-btn, assign-team2-btn) are large with team name and points. Minor: QuestionPage top bar team name font is small (max 0.85rem).

verified_elements.team1_score_block: PASS - visible, shows glow effect when active
